name: 11-queue-enqueue-flood
description: Twelve enqueue calls in one run under an enqueuePerRun ceiling of 8: the ninth enqueue must refuse the run at the enqueue site, before the queue grows past the ceiling.

runs.program: queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP"); queue.enqueue(me, "NOP")
